entries.notes: The keyed phrase 'anything else' logically includes every plausible lesson-based alternative, which would make those distractors partially true.
The source only supplies the ARV expansion. Three alternative definitions would require inventing facts or terminology not present in the lesson material.
The verbatim front is a Concept cue rather than a multiple choice question stem.
